content:
✅ Why This Works:
• Empowers students to research what interests them while maintaining structure.
• Combines creativity & rigorous analysis.
• Builds toward an independent, publishable-level paper.

📌 Revised Weekly Module Structure on Canvas

Each Canvas Week Module should now include:
1. Overview: Course expectations, objectives, readings.
2. Readings & Resources: Primary texts + supplementary articles.
3. Key Literary Terms & Structural Analysis: Students contribute terms.
4. Discussion Board (A Week) OR Close Reading Submission (B Week)
5. Pet Peeve & Reflection Discussion (Weekly Catharsis).
6. “The Medium is the Message” Section: Media & Technology Analysis.
7. Bridging Past & Present Readings: Structured comparative assignment.
8. Guided Writing Task: Writing tip, peer discussion, or low-stakes exercise.
9. Research & Independent Study Block.
context: From document: Comprehensive Course Structure and Alternating Schedule (A & B Weeks… — chunk 18 (chunk 18/108)
